@@ -126,7 +126,7 @@ The safest way to run the
 program is logged in directly as root.
 The recommended procedure is change to the keys directory,
 usually
-.Pa /ust/local/etc ,
+.Pa /usr/local/etc ,
 then run the program.
 When run for the first time,
